task_completion.description: Locate the Flight Crew View app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Flight Crew View' app icon or name is visible on the home screen, app drawer, or within the Android Settings app list.

task_completion.description: Open the App info screen for Flight Crew View
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Android 'App info' screen specifically for 'Flight Crew View' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the data usage settings for the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mobile data & Wi-Fi' or 'Data usage' settings screen is displayed, showing network usage details for Flight Crew View.
The 'Background data' setting and its corresponding toggle switch are clearly visible on the screen.
The toggle switch next to 'Background data' is in the OFF position (typically grayed out and positioned to the left).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Android graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the standard Android Settings UI, not a terminal emulator or command-line interface executing 'netpolicy' commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the setting was changed for the correct application
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'App info' or 'Data usage' screen explicitly displays 'Flight Crew View' or its icon at the top, confirming the correct app is being modified.

integrity.description: Ensure genuine interaction with the Android system
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Android OS settings menus, rather than a web browser searching for instructions, a text editor, or a static image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is 'Flight Crew View' (package: com.robert.fcView). The objective is to restrict its background data usage. This is achieved by turning OFF the 'Background data' setting for this specific app. The setting is typically located by navigating to Android Settings -> Apps -> Flight Crew View -> Mobile data & Wi-Fi (or Data usage). The final successful state must show the 'Background data' toggle switch in the OFF position.
